{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Engineer, Data",
  "description": "Stanbic IBTC Bank is a leading African banking group focused on emerging markets globally. It has been a mainstay of South Africa&#39;s financial system for 150 years, and now spans 16 countries across the African continent.

Standard Bank is a firm believer in technical innovation, to help us guarantee exceptional client service and leading edge financial solutions. Our growing global success reflects our commitment to the latest solutions, the best people, and a uniquely flexible and vibrant working culture. To help us drive our success into the future, we are looking for resourceful individuals to join our dedicated team at our offices.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Engineer, Data

Job Ref ID: 80453731A-0001
Job Location: Walter Carrington Crescent - Lagos&nbsp;
Job Type: Full-time
Business Segment: Personal &amp; Private Banking

Job Description


	The purpose of this role is to construct data acquisition, warehousing and reporting solutions.
	The role is expected to provide technical solutions in response to the needs of stakeholders by interpreting business requirements; defining solution; defining build and test tasks; constructing solutions; performing testing; participating in the deployment of solutions and ensure the systems meet immediate business requirements by providing third tier support and constructing enhancements to systems in Production.&nbsp;


Responsibilities


	Define a task sequence that delivers value to business promptly by applying lean management, Minimum Viable Product (MVP) and iterative delivery concepts.
	Ensure tasks are clearly scoped, with defined acceptance criteria, to ensure clarity of what is required to complete work.
	Construct mechanisms to acquire data from a range of sources with controls that deliver to required data quality standards.
	Apply appropriate continuous integration practices to prevent defects.
	Build solutions that are aligned with the technology strategy and future proofed through appropriate coding practices.
	Ensure applicable standards are addressed in the solution design.
	Apply best data integration, warehousing and reporting practices while utilising MS SQL 2019 technology.


Qualifications


	BSc in IT, Computer Sciences or related field.
	Professional certification such as Azure Data Fundamentals can be an added advantage.


Experience:


	Building databases, warehouses and reporting solutions, Building data integration solutions
	Experience operating within an agile team
	Knowledge of Data Management, Data Warehousing concepts &amp; methodologies (familiarity with at least one of the following databases &amp; design principles: DWH, DataLake, Lakehouse, Delta etc.) will be considered an asset. Basic knowledge of web development technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript) and their integration with databases. ETL environment and understanding of ETL processes.

Engineer, Data Job at Stanbic IBTC Bank




        
    

        
        Stanbic IBTC Bank is a leading African banking group focused on emerging markets globally. It has been a mainstay of South Africa's financial system for 150 years, and now spans 16 countries across the African continent.

Standard Bank is a firm believer in technical innovation, to help us guarantee exceptional client service and leading edge financial solutions. Our growing global success reflects our commitment to the latest solutions, the best people, and a uniquely flexible and vibrant working culture. To help us drive our success into the future, we are looking for resourceful individuals to join our dedicated team at our offices.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Engineer, Data
     

            
    



Job Ref ID: 80453731A-0001
Job Location: Walter Carrington Crescent - Lagos 
Job Type: Full-time
Business Segment: Personal & Private Banking

Job Description


	The purpose of this role is to construct data acquisition, warehousing and reporting solutions.
	The role is expected to provide technical solutions in response to the needs of stakeholders by interpreting business requirements; defining solution; defining build and test tasks; constructing solutions; performing testing; participating in the deployment of solutions and ensure the systems meet immediate business requirements by providing third tier support and constructing enhancements to systems in Production. 


Responsibilities


	Define a task sequence that delivers value to business promptly by applying lean management, Minimum Viable Product (MVP) and iterative delivery concepts.
	Ensure tasks are clearly scoped, with defined acceptance criteria, to ensure clarity of what is required to complete work.
	Construct mechanisms to acquire data from a range of sources with controls that deliver to required data quality standards.
	Apply appropriate continuous integration practices to prevent defects.
	Build solutions that are aligned with the technology strategy and future proofed through appropriate coding practices.
	Ensure applicable standards are addressed in the solution design.
	Apply best data integration, warehousing and reporting practices while utilising MS SQL 2019 technology.


Qualifications


	BSc in IT, Computer Sciences or related field.
	Professional certification such as Azure Data Fundamentals can be an added advantage.


Experience:


	Building databases, warehouses and reporting solutions, Building data integration solutions
	Experience operating within an agile team
	Knowledge of Data Management, Data Warehousing concepts & methodologies (familiarity with at least one of the following databases & design principles: DWH, DataLake, Lakehouse, Delta etc.) will be considered an asset. Basic knowledge of web development technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript) and their integration with databases. ETL environment and understanding of ETL processes.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Executive

Job Location: Asaba, Delta / Lagos

Description


	Be the voice and face of La&rsquo;Realeza International Logistics, Travel &amp; Tour. Handle client bookings, enquiries, complaints, and follow-up across phone, WhatsApp, email, and social media channels.&nbsp;
	Your calm, professional attitude will define how clients feel about our brand.

	CRM tool familiarity

	Career Advancement Opportunities

	Opportunity to Grow with a Leading Nigerian Brand

Customer Service Executive Job at La’Realeza International Limited




        
    

        
        La’Realeza International Limited (RC: 7097545) is a multi-sector Nigerian conglomerate founded in August 2023 by Managing Director Engr. Ikharo Aruna Shaka. Originally established to bridge the trust gap in the Nigerian real estate industry, the firm has expanded its footprint across multiple major economic sectors, operating primarily from its headquarters in Lagos and an administrative hub in Delta State.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Executive

Job Location: Asaba, Delta / Lagos

Description
     

            
    




	Be the voice and face of La’Realeza International Logistics, Travel & Tour. Handle client bookings, enquiries, complaints, and follow-up across phone, WhatsApp, email, and social media channels. 
	Your calm, professional attitude will define how clients feel about our brand.


Key Requirements


	OND / HND / B.Sc Degree in any discipline.
	Excellent verbal communication
	CRM tool familiarity
	Social media savvy
	Conflict resolution skills.


What We Offer


	Competitive Compensation
	Professional Training & Development
	Career Advancement Opportunities
	Dynamic and Supportive Work Environment
	Opportunity to Grow with a Leading Nigerian Brand


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Freight & Logistics Officer Job at La’Realeza International Limited




        
    

        
        La’Realeza International Limited (RC: 7097545) is a multi-sector Nigerian conglomerate founded in August 2023 by Managing Director Engr. Ikharo Aruna Shaka. Originally established to bridge the trust gap in the Nigerian real estate industry, the firm has expanded its footprint across multiple major economic sectors, operating primarily from its headquarters in Lagos and an administrative hub in Delta State.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Freight & Logistics Officer

Job Location: Asaba, Delta

Description
     

            
    




	Coordinate inbound and outbound freight shipments, manage waybills and customs documentation, track consignments across the Delta–Lagos corridor, and ensure timely last-mile delivery.
	You will also liaise with haulage vendors and marine logistics partners.


Key Requirements


	HND / B.Sc Degree in Logistics or Supply Chain 
	2+ years of freight experience
	Customs clearing knowledge
	Marine/haulage coordination
	Proficiency in tracking tools.


What We Offer


	Competitive Compensation
	Professional Training & Development
	Career Advancement Opportunities
	Dynamic and Supportive Work Environment
	Opportunity to Grow with a Leading Nigerian Brand


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
